name: VSGO V-B02E Air Move Dust Blower
description: This amazing hurricane blower cleans the air whilst in use using it's air filter (5 supplied), making sure no dust is blown onto your lens or sensor.

features.Key Features :: Supplied with 5 air filters and two different nozzle lengths | The suckered base allows you to stand your blower upright on any smooth surface | The two nozzles are made from soft silicone which helps avoid any accidental scratching of delicate surfaces
features.What's in The Box :: 1 x Large Silicone blower bulb | 1 x Long Nozzle | 1 x Short Nozzle | 5 x Air Filters
